en.question: Sugar price up 25%. Reduce consumption by what % to keep expenditure same?

en.question: Price of petrol increased 25%. Car mileage increased so expense only up 10%. By what % did mileage increase?
en.explanation: Let initial price=100, consumption=C. New price=125. New consumption=C1. 125C1=110C, C1=0.88C. Mileage increase for same distance: 1/0.88=1.1364, so 13.64% increase.

hi.question: पेट्रोल 25% बढ़ा, खर्च सिर्फ 10% बढ़ा। माइलेज कितने% बढ़ी?

en.question: 20% of a number exceeds 15% of the same number by 25. Find the number.
If radius of circle is increased by 100%, area increases by?
en.explanation: Area ∝ r². r becomes 2r, area becomes 4A. Increase=300%.

en.question: In election, 10% votes invalid. Winner got 60% of valid votes and won by 1620 votes. Total votes?
en.explanation: Let total=V. Valid=0.9V. Winner=0.6×0.9V=0.54V. Loser=0.4×0.9V=0.36V. Difference=0.18V=1620. V=9000.

hi.question: चुनाव में 10% मत अवैध, विजेता को 60% वैध मत, 1620 से जीता। कुल मत?
